name: gemini-for-codex
description: Use Gemini CLI from Codex for read-only review, role-pack review teams, adversarial review, planning, rescue, and tracked job workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Gemini CLI reviews, planning, and stop-gate workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Gemini for Codex connects Codex to the local Gemini CLI for independent read-only code review, schema-validated structured review, reviewer role packs, GitHub Actions PR review templates, adversarial design critique, structured adversarial verdicts, implementation planning, read-only rescue diagnosis, multi-role review fan-out, Gemini native subagent review, background job tracking, session lifecycle hooks, unread-result reminders, noninteractive execution-mode recommendations, Gemini native session diagnostics, sanitized reports, release checks, optional bounded context-provider enrichment, and an opt-in Stop hook review gate. It is designed for multi-model collaboration: Codex implements and reconciles, while Gemini provides a separate reviewer or planner perspective. Gemini invocations use plan mode and bounded inline git context for review workflows, and the Stop gate fails open on Gemini runtime errors unless Gemini explicitly returns a blocking verdict.
capabilities: Session lifecycle hooks and unread-result reminders
Gemini native session and worktree capability gating
defaultPrompt: Use Gemini to review the current git changes.
Use Gemini to produce schema-validated structured review findings.
Generate a fork-safe GitHub Actions workflow for Gemini PR review.
Ask Gemini to challenge this implementation plan.
Run a multi-role Gemini review across correctness, security, tests, release, and adversarial perspectives.
Inspect Gemini reviewer role packs and run a built-in pack such as minimal or release.
Ask whether a Gemini review should run in foreground or background.
Check tracked Gemini jobs and retrieve a stored result by job id.
Inspect Gemini native session support for this repository.
Enable the opt-in Gemini Stop review gate for this repository.
Run a Codex-Gemini collaboration loop and reconcile the findings.
